ocr_findings.description: Chapter opener illustration (smartphone diagrams with 商標権/特許権/意匠権/実用新案権 labels) rendered as img-0.jpeg placeholder; label text within the illustration (タッチディスプレイ, ホームボタン, etc.) not captured in OCR body, but these are diagram annotations rather than primary text.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 産業財産権 definition, comparison table (著作権 vs 産業財産権: 申請の必要性/主な対象者), and 権利の管理 sidebar. The 2-row comparison table is correctly rendered in markdown. Body prose is faithfully transcribed. No character-level errors detected.
